title: Einstein on the Beach: The Changing Image of Opera
original_title: Einstein on the Beach: The Changing Image of Opera
overview: The creative processes of avant-garde composer Philip Glass and progressive director/designer Robert Wilson are examined in this film. It documents their collaboration on this tradition breaking opera.
